overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a highway roadside in a video game environment (resembling GTA V), starting on a dirt shoulder with industrial buildings and power lines, then transitioning onto the asphalt highway surface while vehicles pass by. The scene features clear sunny weather with dry vegetation and distant hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway roadside dirt path with industrial buildings and power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder parallel to highway traffic, passing utility poles and dry vegetation

entered.detail: large concrete utility pole with transformer and power lines running alongside the road
tall lattice steel electricity pylon visible in the distance against the sky
low-rise red brick industrial structures on the hillside to the left
dry grassy hillside rising on the right side of the highway
metal guardrail separating the dirt shoulder from the highway traffic lanes

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt and gravel shoulder beside a busy highway, with industrial brick buildings on the left, dry vegetation, and large transmission towers visible against the clear sky. Vehicles pass by on the right while the camera maintains a steady forward pace.

events.description: camera transitions from dirt shoulder onto the asphalt highway surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved highway shoulder amidst moderate traffic flow

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass bridge with multiple support columns spanning across the road ahead
back of a diamond-shaped traffic sign mounted on a pole along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: Now walking on the asphalt highway surface itself, approaching a concrete overpass bridge. The industrial buildings fade from view behind as the camera continues forward along the busy highway, passing the back of a road sign while vehicles travel in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement that transitions from a dusty industrial roadside onto the open surface of a busy highway. It begins on a dirt and gravel shoulder, passing by brick industrial buildings and large transmission towers under a clear sky while vehicles stream past on the right. As the camera maintains its steady pace, the industrial structures gradually fade from view and the terrain shifts from dry vegetation to the dark asphalt of the highway itself. The scene then expands as the camera moves directly into the flow of traffic, passing the back of a road sign before approaching a concrete overpass bridge.
